zh.Kinderton Manor, Kinderton-cum-Hulme, Kn: 英國英格蘭爾金德頓 姆 赫爾姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton於1116年出生在英國英格蘭爾金德頓 姆 赫爾姆時，他的父親Gilbert de Venables II66歲，母親Magery Croxton62歲。他於1135年與Baroness Margery de Hatton在英國爾金德頓結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他在英國英格蘭爾金德頓被列為earl of chester, third baron of kinderton。他去世於1188年10月11日在英國英格蘭爾金德頓享年72歲。

nameMeanings.name: Venables
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton was born in 1116, in Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Gilbert de Venables II, was 66 and his mother, Magery Croxton, was 62. He married Baroness Margery de Hatton in 1135, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 1 daughter. His occupation is listed as earl of chester, third baron of kinderton in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. He died on 11 October 1188, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton est né en 1116, à Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gilbert de Venables II, avait 66 ans et sa mère, Magery Croxton, avait 62 ans. Il a épousé Baroness Margery de Hatton en 1135, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 1 fille. Sa profession de son indiquée est earl of chester, third baron of kinderton à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 11 octobre 1188, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton è nato il nel 1116 nel Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gilbert de Venables II, aveva 66 anni e il suo madre, Magery Croxton, aveva 62 anni. Lui sposato Baroness Margery de Hatton nel 1135, nel Kinderton, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 1 figlia. La sua occupazione è indicata come earl of chester, third baron of kinderton nel Kinderton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 11 ottobre 1188, nel Kinderton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kindertonが1116年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトン クウム ハルメで生まれた時，父Gilbert de Venables IIは66歳，母Magery Croxtonは62歳であった。1135年にイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンでBaroness Margery de Hattonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンでの職業はearl of chester, third baron of kindertonと記録されている。彼は1188年10月11日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンで72歳で死去した。

ko.Kinderton Manor, Kinderton-cum-Hulme, Kn: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 킨더턴 쿠 훌
ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton(이)가 1116년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 킨더턴 쿠 훌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert de Venables II(은)는 66세였고, 그의 어머니 Magery Croxton(은)는 62세였다. 그는 1135년 영국 체실르 킨더턴에서 Baroness Margery de Hatton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 킨더턴에서 earl of chester, third baron of kinderton이었다. 그는 1188년 10월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 킨더턴에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton nasceu em 1116, em Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gilbert de Venables II, tinha 66 anos e sua mãe, Magery Croxton, tinha 62 anos. Ele casou-se com Baroness Margery de Hatton em 1135, em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 1 filha. Sua profissão aparece como earl of chester, third baron of kinderton em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 11 de outubro de 1188, em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 72 anos.

ru.Kinderton Manor, Kinderton-cum-Hulme, Kn: киндиртон кум хулм, чешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton родился в 1116 г. в местности киндиртон кум хулм, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gilbert de Venables II было 66 лет, а матери, которую звали Magery Croxton, 62. Он женился на женщине по имени Baroness Margery de Hatton в 1135 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 1 дочь.  Он работал по профессии earl of chester, third baron of kinderton в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 11 октября 1188 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton nació en 1116, en Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Gilbert de Venables II, tenía 66 años y su mamá, Magery Croxton, tenía 62 años. Se casó con Baroness Margery de Hatton en 1135, en Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 1 hija. Su ocupación registrada era earl of chester, third baron of kinderton en Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 11 de octubre de 1188, en Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 72 años.
